title: Modern Elements
description: Explore 250+ realistic chemicals with Modern Elements! From Acids and Bases to Organic compounds and Alloys, this mod brings authentic chemistry to Minecraft 1.21.1. Featuring custom 3D lab models, dynamic fluid tints, and a full periodic table.
body: **![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MODERN_ELEMENTS/MP_ME_Header.webp)** *** **![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MODERN_ELEMENTS/MP_ME_Description.webp)** **Modern Elements** is a comprehensive chemistry and materials science framework for Minecraft 1.21.1. Designed for both technical players and builders, this mod introduces a massive library of over 100 realistic compounds, elements, and alloys, all rendered with high-quality 3D laboratory models. __**This mod is intended to be used by other mods/modpacks.**__ __**On its own, it only adds items and there are no ways to get them, except from the creative menu.**__ ### Core Features * 118 Elements: Every element on the periodic table of elements. * 100 Unique Compounds: Explore a deep registry of Acids, Bases, Oxides, Salts, Organics, Halides, and Alloys. * Detailed 3D Labware: See your chemicals stored in realistic Beakers, Erlenmeyer Flasks, Petri Dishes, and Crucibles. * Dynamic Tints: Utilizing a custom color registry, every compound is visually distinct. * Architectury Powered: Built from the ground up to provide a native experience on both **Fabric** and **NeoForge**. ### Comprehensive Material States To ensure seamless integration with industrial automation, every element and compound in the registry includes a full suite of states: * Solid States: Each chemical provides three distinct item forms: **Nuggets**, **Ingots**, and **Blocks**. * Liquid State: A dedicated **Fluid** for transport via pipes and storage in tanks. * Gaseous State: A specialized **Gas Fluid** for pressurized systems and atmospheric processing. ### Technical Chemistry Whether you are looking to create **Sulfuric Acid** for industrial processing or forging **Stainless Steel** for high-tier construction, Modern Elements provides the atomic foundation. Each chemical is defined by its real-world composition: * Glucose: C6H12O6 * Baking Soda: NaHCO3 * Methane: CH4 ### Perfect For: * Technical Modpacks: A perfect companion for mods like _Create_ or _Modern Industrialization_. * Laboratory Builders: Use the detailed 3D models to decorate your high-tech bases. * Educational Play: Learn real-world chemical classifications and formulas while you play. ### Mods Using Modern Elements: * [**Create: Alchemy**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-alchemy) ### Modpacks Using Modern Elements: * [Clockwork Laboratory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/clockwork-laboratory) ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MODERN_ELEMENTS/MP_ME_Screenshots.webp) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/666/periotic_table-png.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/706/compounds-png.png)
